threats.title: Why Third-Party Risk Is the Biggest Gap in Your Clients' Security Posture
threats.summary: The next major breach hitting your clients probably won't come from inside their walls. It'll come through a vendor they trust, a SaaS tool their finance team signed up for, or a subcontractor nobody in IT knows about. threats.title: New SparkCat Variant in iOS, Android Apps Steals Crypto Wallet Recovery Phrase Images
